name: 12q14_microdeletion_HMGA2
description: 12q14 microdeletion syndrome — recurrent ~1-3 Mb interstitial deletion at 12q14.3, with breakpoints frequently in flanking SD blocks. Critical gene HMGA2 (haploinsufficiency = growth restriction, intellectual disability, osteopoikilosis if LEMD3 included). Phenotype: short stature, ID, learning disability, characteristic facies, occasional osteopoikilosis.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~20-100 kb at >95% identity mediate a fraction of breakpoints; unique core contains HMGA2 (primary dosage gene), LEMD3 (osteopoikilosis), MSRB3, GRIP1, RAB3IP.
